validation.summary: 18 contract, packaging, and Skill audit tests pass. The checks freeze the closed 18-operation catalog, reject raw/confirmation inputs and deferred operations, prevent host-policy duplication, forbid broad evidence labels, and prevent exactly-once wording from public surfaces.

review.evidence: No approved capability was removed or activated; the audit adds only regression guards around the public boundary.

obligation_evidence.evidence: The mechanical audit keeps inspect-only ownership, digest-bound clean, closed public inputs, low-risk-only routing, deferred adoption, and exact evidence boundaries intact.

recovery: Keep all approved operations intact. If a later change breaks an exclusion guard, reopen its owning contract rather than activating a deferred capability.
